channel.title: HJB on Tianhao Zhao
channel.description: Recent content in HJB on Tianhao Zhao

item.title: Finite difference scheme: Monotonicity violation of a class of interpolations
item.author: tianhao.zhao@emory.edu (Tianhao Zhao)
item.description: Monotonicity condition can be violated when points are denoted by multiple grid points.

item.title: Monotone discretization of 2nd order mixed derivatives: Wide stencil method
item.author: tianhao.zhao@emory.edu (Tianhao Zhao)
item.description: Monotone stencil for problems with non-zero 2nd order mixed derivatives.

item.title: Standard notations for my notes about HJB equation
item.author: tianhao.zhao@emory.edu (Tianhao Zhao)
item.description: A collection of standard notations for all of my notes about HJB equation and numerical PDE.
